releases.name: SpeakNote 0.2.0

releases.author: waheni
releases.description:
# 📦 SpeakNote v0.2.0 — Release Notes

### 🎙️ Voice Recording & AI Transcription for Obsididian

This release marks the **first Marketplace-ready version** of SpeakNote — an Obsidian plugin that lets you record audio directly and automatically transcribe it using modern AI transcription APIs.

---

## ✨ What's New in v0.2.0

### 🎤 Voice Recording
- One-click recording via ribbon
- Smooth start/stop with safety checks
- Audio saved as `.webm` files
- Auto-fallback filenames to prevent conflicts
- Mic permissions & device errors handled gracefully

### 🧠 AI Transcription
- Supports **OpenAI Whisper**, **Deepgram Nova**, **AssemblyAI**
- Auto-transcription when recording ends
- Floating overlay with spinner: “Transcribing your recording…”
- Clean Markdown transcript generation
- Multi-language support (EN, FR, ES, DE)

### 🗂 Vault Integration
- Custom saving folder (default: `SpeakNotes`)
- Safe file handling (duplicate, invalid names, missing folders)
- Floating audio player with fade animation & auto-hide

### 🛡 Stability & Error Handling
- Centralized error handler for all operations
- Friendly messages for:
  - invalid API keys
  - missing keys
  - quota exceeded
  - network errors
  - unsupported languages
  - missing files
- Protection against Obsidian crashes (ENOENT, invalid paths)
- Safe fallback creation for both audio & transcript files

### ⏱ Recording Limits
- Free version: **1-minute max recording**
- Premium (coming soon): **up to 5 minutes**
- Upgrade notification prepared

---

## ⚙️ Settings Overview
- Choose transcription provider  
- Enter your API key  
- Language selection  
- Auto-transcribe toggle  
- Choose recordings folder  
- Early Access signup placeholder  

---

## 🛠 Fixes & Improvements
- Fixed playback crash when file was deleted  
- Fixed invalid folder path crash  
- Improved ribbon icon animations  
- Improved overlay visibility  
- Disabled recording toggle spam  
- Cleaner code & stronger UX consistency  

---

## 📦 Installation
Download the ZIP from this release containing:

```
manifest.json
main.js
styles.css
```

Place them in:

```
<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/speaknote/
```

---

## 🔮 Roadmap (Next Versions)
### v0.3.0
- Google Sign-In  
- Premium unlock (5-minute limit)  
- Better language-per-provider mapping  

### v1.0.0
- Local Whisper (no API)
- Noise filtering  
- Mobile UI enhancements  

Created with ❤️ by **Heni Wael (Neurahex)**  
GitHub: https://github.com/waheni  
Email : waelheni@neurahex.com
releases.name: SpeakNote v0.2.0

releases.author: waheni
releases.description:
# 🎉 SpeakNote — v0.1.1-beta
**Your voice → instantly transcribed into Obsidian notes.**

## 🚀 Overview
This is the first public beta of SpeakNote, a voice-powered note-taking plugin for Obsidian.  
It lets you record audio, save it automatically, and generate clean text notes using AI transcription.

## ✨ Features
- 🎤 Voice recording inside Obsidian  
- 💾 Auto-save audio (.webm)  
- 🧠 AI transcription (Deepgram, AssemblyAI, OpenAI Whisper)  
- 📝 Auto-create Markdown notes  
- ▶️ Floating audio player  
- ⚙️ Settings page (provider + API keys)  
- 🔄 Busy-state overlay  
- ⚠️ Error handling for API limits, invalid keys, network errors  
- ⭐ Duplicate file protection  
- 🪟 Auto-open transcript note  

## 🐛 Known Limitations (Beta)
- No language selector yet  
- Folder picker basic  
- No mobile UI optimization  
- No usage counters  

## 📦 Installation
1. Download the attached ZIP  
2. Extract into: `.obsidian/plugins/speaknote/`  
3. Enable SpeakNote in Obsidian settings  

## 🧭 Roadmap
### v0.2
- Language selector  
- Better audio player UI  
- Hotkeys  
- Improved folder picker  

### v0.3+
- Streaming transcription  
- Summaries & cleanup  
- Offline Whisper  

## 💬 Feedback
GitHub Issues: https://github.com/waheni/obsidian-speaknote/issues  
Email: waelheni@neurahex.com
releases.name: SpeakNote v1.1-beta
